rules.name: generate
rules.prompt: Read the file 'prompt.txt' using read-file tool. Answer the question you find there with a brief, factual response. Write your answer to 'response.txt' using write-file tool.

rules.name: validate
rules.run: python3 -c "text = open('response.txt').read(); valid = 'Paris' in text or (('Stub output' in text or 'oracle output' in text) and len(text.strip()) > 0); open('validation.txt', 'w').write('PASS\\n' if valid else 'FAIL\\n')"
